item.title: I stand with JoCat
item.description:
Apparently, this adorably super-inclusive video about liking All The Girls has led to a level of harassment against JoCat resulting in him no longer creating content.
This Dungeons & Discourse video [https://youtu.be/dgIaOXH6hso] was in my recommended today and I was all WTF but really though?
Did a quick search for "miss you jocat" and saw lots, lots more. T_T
JoCat.net has a whole statement on why this is happening, it's sad and it's gross.
This kind of behavior from people on the internet towards people who create content on the internet is inhumane, and I respect JoCat's decision. That said, it's exhausting to see over and over again, it's exhausting to read/listen to vitriol from Know It All Trolls who get all Wiser Than Thou in the comments and then decide to take their nonsense into Meatspace with doxxing and packages and jfc ffs.
Even making this post is basically like WHY SHOULD I BOTHER foreseeing the potential for backlash from people I don't know because I support a human who made something cute and WE CAN'T EVEN HAVE CUTE THINGS FROM NICE PEOPLE ANYMORE OR SUPPORT EACH OTHER IN LOSING CUTE THINGS AND CUTE PEOPLE ANYMORE. But I'm posting anyway because Imgur is full of good people and it feels like the last place on the internet that understands why this feels awful. So fuck it, here's some vulnerability. FP EDIT: I love you people. Give to the @TheFreePizzaDude fund (I can't right now) or, like, save some money for yourself so you can live decently, or send me positive mental health stuff because I can always use it. And keep being good to each other.

I would most certainly steamboat a Willie.
The more unhinged the pair the better. Give me Compo from Last of the Summer Wine with Hozier.
aaaaaaaaaaa
Stop calling me out.
OK, which one is the "Me" and "I" in this picture, because it's potentially every single character in this picture.

item.title: The 377th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 31
item.description:
owo
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
WHY IS THE TORT EVEN THERE?!
Ope, no sound on these two
Skills
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: I deleted my calorie counting app. Wish me luck
item.description: So, I am going to try to eat 3 meals a day, veg, fruit, and try to re-learn my hunger cues. If I gain a bit of weight, so be it at this point. My bmi is 20, from 27 last year. I have a very bad diet lately because all I have been focusing on is calories. It sounds strange, I know, but for some reason calorie counting gives me tendencies to minimize even healthy foods for the sake of calories. This sounds weird….but I was often eating sweets instead of actual food. It worked for weight loss, horrible for everything else. Today I made myself the breakfast in the photo. It was daunting, but I feel good after eating actual food as opposed to just iced coffee for breakfast like I have been. I also threw away my vape. I am going to start cooking again. I am going to minimize foods that override your hunger cues like ultra processed sweets, and watch what I eat . This doesn’t mean I won’t ever eat treats but I’m not going to be living on food without protein or vitamins. Oddly enough when I am calorie counting I live on processed foods because they are easier to count for a lazy person. I am going to focus on sensible portions of actual food and prepare them in standard ways. Last year, I went through a period of stress that resulted in unintentional weight loss, that resulted in me calorie counting, that then resulted in me developing habits that were borderline disordered. I’m not going to say how many calories I was actually eating but it was way too low, resulted in rapid weight loss for someone who wasn’t actually even technically overweight by the time I started calorie counting, and yeah…..it got weird. Pro life tip. If someone loses 30 lb/14 kg in three months and isn’t very obese, that is a red flag. Please do not rush them with compliments on their weight loss, especially if they aren’t talking about it. I wish people wouldn’t comment on weight loss unless the person brings it up. This experience honestly has opened my eyes to how weird people are about weight and how I essentially brainwashed myself into believing what I was doing was healthy even though my hair was literally falling out and my skin was flaking. I was posting before and afters being so delusional that I thought I was being healthy because I was losing weight, even though rationally that wasn’t the case. Also, additionally, I was getting an over abundance of encouragement to continue to lose more and more weight while in a healthy weight range by people in my life, because a lot of women here are very small and the local standard is a very thin, short woman. I will never be shorter, but being thinner pushed me closer to the standard. Wish me luck. I will be posting pictures of home cooked meals again soon. But thought I’d share. Edit: I have lost more than enough weight, I’m not really looking for weight loss advice. My waist to height ratio indicates I’m underweight, even though my bmi is normal. If you use the new bmi calculator that accounts for height, my bmi is just under 20. I am trying to rebuild my relationship with food and if I lose or gain some weight from that I don’t know, but I’ll accept it as it is. Obviously if either case is excessive I’ll evaluate as needed, but I am looking to maintain my weight in a healthier way. The problem isn’t that calorie counting doesn’t “work”, it’s that it worked “too well” to the point where it became an obsession with getting my weight as low as possible with complete disregard to an actual nutritionally complete diet. Sure, yes you can lose crazy amounts of weight eating protein bars, cookies, and frozen meals. No, that isn’t healthy. I imagine someone with a bmi of 23 that eats actual fresh food and plant matter is likely to be healthier than someone with a bmi of 19 that is living on quest bars, frozen food and Diet Coke. Both people are technically a healthy weight, but one will likely be seen as more healthy by the general population because they’re thinner. Also, I still am planning on being aware of calories, but I am not counting every single gram of garlic I am putting in my pasta sauce. I’m eating mindfully, and not mindlessly eating. For me personally, calorie counting apps foster this behavior, but I am not saying that is the case for everyone. Some people do well with these apps, but for me, having an app congratulate me for eating an amount that’s way too low for my height and activity level isn’t great for my mental health.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: Memes vol 233 Star Wars
item.description:
SCIENCE FICTION (oooh oooh oooh)
DOUBLE FEATURE
Ok so my friend had never seen Star Wars and so we organized a nerd night for him to watch it and y’all I’m terrible to watch movies with- Jesus Christ. I love to talk.
I LOVE revenge of the sith- fight me. Anakin is so hot in that one. That’s not the only reason I like it but like oh my word
Obi Wan, Leia, Lando, Poe, Padme, Chopper
I love him so much
CUZ I HAVENT HAD MY MUFFIN YET, MATT!!
Probably Aayla and that whole doomed romance
I saw this and it made me laugh so hard so I screenshotted it
That’s my boyfriend (I’ve never played)
I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry
My friend was watching it and he pointed to the little robot and goes “ITS A ROOMBA!!”
Froggy tax + me with my long hair
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.title: Goodbye Bob
item.description: This was Bob, Big Orangie boy. He came to our yard for a few years for pets and snacks, a good boy and a sweet kitty. A few days before the 16th he had a limp and by the 16th it was clearly putting his lifestyle at risk so I took him to the neighborhood vet. He had a medium abscess and within two days it had drained and mostly healed. I took him home for a day of observation before reintroducing him (he had recently been fixed). On release where he could roam, his back leg was causing him pain and it was swollen so back to the vet he went and a fairly substantial hematoma was removed from his back leg. His recovery was much slower, and he wasn't eating but as of yesterday he was starting to recover. Today he took a sudden turn for the worse, lethargic and weak, barely moving. I had no idea he wasn't well and visited in the evening thinking i might take him home and find him so immobile I though he was dead, definitely suffering from advanced sepsis. The vet was a little unsure of how to proceed and after consulting with another vet, it was clear it was an emergency. I took him to another, better equipped vet and we started warming him from 35.1, just a tenth over past saving. At best, sepsis has a 40% mortality rate, this was a long shot. He got warmed and started a pre-warmed IV and lasted about 20 minutes. He passed as I stroked his head. He was the calmest and most gentle of the yard cats, never fussed about anything. He'd definitely been in some cat fights and it is possible his last killed him, but with people and the regular neighborhood cats, he was a sweetheart. He gave great head bumps and was quick with a firm leg rub and purred easily when picked up, never getting squirmy or scratchy. He was our big orangie boy and we will miss him.
item.dc:creator: gesel

item.title: When will the 1st death happen before we can codify Roe
item.dc:creator: stopfGemBaron

item.title: Starting art and finally got to a point where I feel good enough to post!
item.description:
Been drawing off and on for a few years, but since September 2023 I really started working on improving! Here's a teaser of my latest drawing (full later in post)!
I started simple, following an ink and paper style by Stephen Travers on youtube, who has amazing videos on that cool style. Here's my first of a tulip tree!
Following the same style, I upped the scale a bit and went for a Northern Catalpa tree! Love the twisting branches!
Finally did one of an old stone barn! If you like the style of these pics, I highly recommend checking out Stephen's videos on youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@stephentraversart
Around October, I wanted to try out some portraits! I sketched a LOT of really rough stuff, before I focused and took my time on a few! Here following videos by SamDoesArts on youtube, and using the Lumis method to assist the form... Check out Sam's amazing art too! https://www.youtube.com/@samdoesarts
After realizing I needed to work on my proportions quite a bit, I did a draw-along with Chommang on his youtube! https://www.youtube.com/@Chommang I love the style of his art, so I wanted to follow this up with another of his draw-alongs!
Following another of Chommang's video's, I spent a long time and lots of ctrl+z-ing on these portraits! Starting to feel comfortable with these...
Finally in November, I threw everything I'd learned into one complete picture! I wanted to capture that cozy autumn feeling of a road-side produce stand! I'd love to keep posting more stuff as I keep learning and getting better! Thanks!
item.dc:creator: Midfallen

item.title: Anniversary of a meme
item.description:
In January 2005, a guy named Dave Roth was watching the local fire department practice with a real fire. He snapped a photo of her at the scene. Took awhile to go viral, but it sure did go viral.
This is her in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Huor
